user_query: Delete office hours from my todo list
nodes_to_delete: Root > ToDoList_Version 1 > Work > TA: Intro to ML (CS480) > Task 2
reasoning: Only Task 2 under TA: Intro to ML clearly corresponds to 'office hours'. Other candidates were semantic/partial matches but their descriptions (Duolingo streak, request reference letters, confirm headcount, grade midterms) do not actually refer to office hours, so they were excluded to avoid incorrect deletions.
